kpis.name: Defensive area (m^2)
kpis.description: The size of the area, measured in square meters, that a player covers defensively in open play. It is measured as the area that covers 68% of the player's open play defensive actions adjusted by the opponent's possession.

kpis.name: Defensive line height (m)
kpis.description: Average height on the pitch, measured in meters, of the player's defensive actions.

kpis.name: Opposition pass success % into defensive area
kpis.description: Percentage of the opponent's passes into the player's defensive area that are successful.
kpis.display_name: Opposition pass success % into defensive area

kpis.name: Opposition xT into defensive area
kpis.description: Accumulated action-based xT per 100 successful opponent passes into the player's defensive area.
